name: EdwBhiMbrCobItemSplitXcomLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH source_data AS (SELECT A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, B.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, B.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, B.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_ENR_SPLT A JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB B ON A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY WHERE B.MBR_COB_TYP_CD = 'XCOM' AND A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK <= B.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK AND A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK >= B.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK AND A.MBR_MED_COB_CD = 'P'), transform_data AS (SELECT source_data.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY, source_data.MBR_EFF_DT_SK AS MBR_EFF_DT_SK, source_data.MBR_TERM_DT_SK AS MBR_TERM_DT_SK, source_data.MBR_COB_TYP_CD AS MBR_COB_TYP_CD, source_data.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK AS MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, source_data.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK AS MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, CASE WHEN source_data.MBR_EFF_DT_SK < source_data.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK THEN source_data.MBR_EFF_DT_SK ELSE 'NULL' END AS BEG_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN source_data.MBR_EFF_DT_SK < source_data.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, CONVERT(DATE, source_data.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, 112)), 112) ELSE 'NULL' END AS BEG_TERM_DT_SK, CASE WHEN source_data.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK < source_data.MBR_EFF_DT_SK THEN source_data.MBR_EFF_DT_SK ELSE source_data.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK END AS MID_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN source_data.MBR_TERM_DT_SK < source_data.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK THEN source_data.MBR_TERM_DT_SK ELSE source_data.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK END AS MID_TERM_DT_SK, CASE WHEN source_data.MBR_TERM_DT_SK > source_data.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, 1, CONVERT(DATE, source_data.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, 112)), 112) ELSE 'NULL' END AS END_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN source_data.MBR_TERM_DT_SK > source_data.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK THEN source_data.MBR_TERM_DT_SK ELSE 'NULL' END AS END_TERM_DT_SK FROM source_data) SELECT MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_TERM_DT_SK, MBR_COB_TYP_CD, MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, BEG_EFF_DT_SK, BEG_TERM_DT_SK, MID_EFF_DT_SK, MID_TERM_DT_SK, END_EFF_DT_SK, END_TERM_DT_SK FROM transform_data
